5_Black Tongue.story: My first Air Jordans.  They were a birthday gift from my parents in November 1990.

16_Volt.story: I really loved these shoes when i first saw them in 1989.  I believe the colorway that was released was Citron, but in my memory they looked like this, which is why i have this colorway in my collection.

4_Black Cement.story: Although the Fire Red 4s were my first love, these are a close second.

4_Fire Red.story: I first saw this shoe in 1989 in my local shoe store and immediately fell in love.  Unfortunately the $115 price tag, and the fact that I was growing like a weed made convincing my parents to buy them impossible.

11_Flu Game.story: I originally had these in 1997 in the playoff colorway.  I traded my neighbor Tom a brand new pair of foamposites.

15_Hot Lava.story: The first pair of Nike Air shoes I owned. My parents bought these for me as a graduation gift from elementary school.

8_Playoffs.story: In 1993, I went with my father to look for the Air Force Max CB.  After hitting about five stores, I "settled" for these.

9_Olive.story: I had these in French Blue in 2002.
